more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Police bust drugs syndicate, recover 200kgs of dagga
more.description: IN a significant development in the fight against drugs and substance misuse, authorities in Beitbridge, Matebeleland South province, have busted a drugs syndicate leading to the recovery of 200 kilogrammes of dagga. more.title: Blessing Muzarabani joins Kolkata Knight Riders ahead of IPL 2026
more.description: KOLKATA Knight Riders have enlisted the services of Zimbabwean international fast bowler Blessing Muzarabani for the 2026 season of the Indian Premier League (IPL). more.description: PRESIDENT Emmerson Mnangagwa officially launched the National Artificial Intelligence (AI) Strategy this Friday at the New Parliament Building in Mt Hampden, amid increased internet growth. more.description: THE High Court of Zimbabwe has temporarily halted the rape trial of Prophetic Healing and Deliverance (PHD) Ministries founder Walter Magaya, which was set to proceed at the magistrate’s court. more.title: Government warns of rising human trafficking scams targeting Zimbabwean job seekers
more.description: ZIMBABWEANS have been warned against a growing wave of deceptive recruitment schemes that are luring desperate job seekers into human trafficking networks, particularly in neighbouring South Africa and parts of the Middle East. more.title: Rebuilding Zimbabwe’s Machinery Industry: Innovation, Skills and Strategic Partnerships as the Next Industrial Frontier
more.description: Zimbabwe’s manufacturing sector has long been recognised as one of the most diversified in Southern Africa.
